sglang.title: fix: minor fix TransportProxyTensor under tp
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Cuda tensor IPC only supports exporting a handle from a "clean tensor" (not cuda-ipced before) from the "original thread".
In TP-scenario, when Scheduler on tp0 received a cuda-ipc tensor from TokenizerManager on tp0, it will try broadcasting that tensor to Schedulers on tp!=0, causing th

sglang.title: [router] add different policies for p node and d node
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The SGLang router's PD (Prefill-Decode) disaggregated mode previously only supported a single routing policy for both prefill and decode nodes. This limitation prevented users from optimizing routing strategies based on the different characteristics of prefill and decode workloads.
For ex

sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #8420
The current Xgrammar is using stop_tokens detected from TokenizerInfo. It only uses tokenizer.eos_token_id to check if the generation is terminated. However, in general, model's config.json includes more eot tokens.

Modifications

Pass model_config.hf_eos_token_id from schedu
